title: Vanilla Melee Starter Path
author: TerraPath Team
summary: A simple vanilla melee progression guide.

stages.title: First Night
stages.description: {{icon:Terraria/AviatorSunglasses}}Collect movement items, prepare a basic arena, and secure a reliable early weapon.{{icon:Terraria/Cutlass}}

stages.title: Early Hardmode
stages.description: Upgrade mobility, collect your first hardmode armor set, and prepare for the mechanical bosses.

stages.title: After Moon Lord
stages.description: Switch into the final endgame loadout and collect the last upgrades for this class.
